ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the publication */,
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geography of the publication */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the publication's website (if available) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Brief summary of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_geography_id FOREIGN KEY ("geography_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geography */,
  "geography_name" TEXT /* Name of the geography */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geography */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geography */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geography */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the geography belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* Open Researcher and Contributor ID (ORCID) of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_type_links" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication type */,
  "type_order" INTEGER /* Order of the publication type in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication being discussed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the search */,
  "query" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the search was made */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of search query (e.g., keyword, author, category) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the search query */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication in the search result */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Relevance ranking of the search result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id", "publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the publication */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the publication */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads of the publication */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations of the publication */,
  "views_last_week" INTEGER /* Number of views in the last week */,
  "views_last_month" INTEGER /* Number of views in the last month */,
  "downloads_last_week" INTEGER /* Number of downloads in the last week */,
  "downloads_last_month" INTEGER /* Number of downloads in the last month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user being followed */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_views" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of the view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "user_id", "view_date")
)
